cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. The question is asking between what times Andrew could have gone to the clothing store. We know that Andrew did various things with different people at specific times, and the store was closed after 9pm. So I need to see when Andrew was free to go to the store. First, let me list out all the time slots where Andrew was seen doing something else: - Andrew woke up at 5am. So he wasn't asleep before that, but I don't know if he was doing something else before 5am. But since the first activity is at 5am with William, maybe he was just waking up then. - William saw Andrew playing tennis from 5am to 6am. So between 5 and 6, he was at the tennis court. - Jessica saw him buying lunch at the deli from 6am to 9am. So from 6 to 9, he was at the deli. - Tiffany saw him taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 9am to 11am. So 9 to 11, he's in Italy? Maybe he's traveling? Anyway, he's there then. - John saw Andrew at the train station from 11am to 5pm. That's a long time, from 11 in the morning until 5 in the evening. So 11am to 5pm, he's waiting at the station. - Sarah saw him reading at the library from 6pm to 9pm. So from 6pm to 9pm, he's in the library. The store is closed after 9pm, so he must have gone before that. The store could be open earlier, but the problem doesn't say when it opens, just that it's closed after 9pm.
